---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a detailed bug report to help us improve SonicMaster
title: "[BUG] "
labels: "bug, needs triage"
assignees: ""
---

## 🐞 Bug Report

### Description of the Bug

<!--
Please provide a clear, detailed, and comprehensive description of what the bug is.
Explain exactly what happened, and why you believe it is a bug. The more detail you provide, the easier it is for us to fix!
-->

### Steps to Reproduce

<!--
Provide explicit, step-by-step instructions on how to reproduce the behavior.
If we can't reproduce it, we can't fix it.
-->

1. Launch SonicMaster.
2. Navigate to '...'
3. Click on '....'
4. Scroll down to '....'
5. Observe the error/unexpected behavior.

### Expected Behavior

<!--
A clear and concise description of what you originally expected to happen before the bug occurred.
-->

### Actual Behavior

<!--
What actually happened? Did the app crash? Did the UI freeze? Did a track skip?
-->

### Screenshots or Screen Recordings

<!--
If applicable, drag and drop screenshots, error dialogs, or screen recordings here to help explain your problem.
Visual evidence is incredibly helpful for UI bugs.
-->

### Environment Details

<!--
Please complete the following information accurately. Bugs often only appear on specific operating systems or versions.
-->

- **Operating System:** [e.g., Windows 11 Pro 23H2, macOS Sonoma 14.2, Ubuntu 22.04 LTS]
- **SonicMaster Version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Installation Method:** [e.g., Setup.exe installer, portable version, built from source]

### Application Logs (Optional but Highly Recommended)

<!--
If the app crashed or displayed an error, please paste the contents of the developer console (Ctrl+Shift+I) or terminal logs here.
Use a code block (```) to format logs properly.
-->

```text
// Paste logs here
```

### Additional Context

<!--
Add any other context, edge cases, or related issues about the problem here.
Does this only happen with specific file formats (like FLAC or MP3)? Does it only happen after the app has been running for hours?
-->
